expectations.text: The reference card names code-simplifier as a distinct, required Phase 6 subagent step.
expectations.evidence: The Required Sequence table lists only 'code-reviewer' as a subagent role across all four steps. Code-simplifier does not appear anywhere in the card. The 'What this card does not include' section states 'Steps not specified in Phase 6 of the workflow are not listed here', implicitly excluding it.

expectations.text: The reference card names code-reviewer as a distinct, required Phase 6 subagent step.
expectations.evidence: Required Sequence Step 1: 'Launch independent quality review agent(s) | code-reviewer | Light: at least 1 agent; Standard/Deep: multiple agents in parallel with differentiated focuses.' Explicitly named as required.

expectations.text: The reference card shows code-simplifier executed before code-reviewer (not after, not as a merged step).
expectations.evidence: Code-simplifier is completely absent from the reference card. No ordering for it is possible.

expectations.text: The card does not describe Phase 6 as exclusively code-reviewer agents with no simplifier step.
expectations.evidence: The card describes Phase 6 exclusively in terms of code-reviewer agents. The Required Sequence table contains only code-reviewer as a subagent role. The 'Subagent mandate by track' section lists only code-reviewer for all three tracks. No simplifier step appears anywhere.

expectations.text: The card attributes these steps to the workflow's Phase 6 specification, not personal preference.
expectations.evidence: Card header states 'Source: feature-dev skill, Phase 6 specification'. Final section says 'This card reflects the workflow as written.' and 'Steps not specified in Phase 6 of the workflow are not listed here.'
